**Sensitive data note:** Credentials listed (API key PZD8GFFU, DB password AQ2MKQUS, etc.) appear to be test/example values; confirm if real and revoke immediately.

**Operational summary (2026-07-19):** Extensive infrastructure operations across 20+ services (export-pipeline, auth-service, search-indexer, webhook-relay, audit-logger, etc.) in five environments (production, staging, QA, dev sandbox, canary/blue/green pools). Operations include: upgrades, patches, scaling, rollbacks, reconfigurations, health-checks. Outcomes: mostly successful; some required manual retries or emitted warnings; no customer impact reported. Memory/CPU pressure reduced in several cases. Documentation updated; follow-up config-tidying tasks filed. Grafana panels showed expected dip-and-recovery patterns. Postmortem notes added to runbooks where applicable.
